title: Senior Software Engineer - Rackspace India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Rackspace India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Rackspace India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Jabalpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Rackspace India:
Rackspace India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rackspace India!
